title: HTTP Representations, Validators, Ranges, and File Transfer · Execution Trace: Representation Metadata
summary: A download endpoint guesses MIME types, buffers large bodies, ignores validators and Range, and treats Content-Disposition text as trusted HTML. Predict the representation, storage, trust, cost, and recovery evidence before inspecting a model. Planned artifact: Add and verify the representation metadata increment in HTTP file-representation and transfer contract. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Define media type, content length, content encoding, language, disposition, filename parameters, and cache metadata as representation facts.
Model storage, request, transfer, retrieval, invalidation, compute, and operational cost together with regional and dependency failures.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

steps.title: S3, CloudFront, and Go Predict Representation Metadata · Theory Representation Metadata
steps.instruction:
theory case — A theory Go file-delivery team handles case 6210 during a regional dependency incident. Build deterministic Go evidence to validate conditional inclusive byte ranges and response-body cleanup; keep browser execution deterministic and move AWS claims to an authorized transfer gate; then double concurrent transfers and keep process resource limits intact. Browser code uses pure values and state transitions only. AWS SDK packages, networks, S3, CloudFront, KMS, IAM, WAF, databases, credentials, host state, race and leak checks, load, faults, restore, billing, and production behavior require explicit authorized transfer gates. Competency probe: Define media type, content length, content encoding, language, disposition, filename parameters, and cache metadata as representation facts.

Before reading, predict which action preserves the Representation Metadata contract for the supplied data.

steps.title: S3, CloudFront, and Go Bound Representation Metadata · Theory Representation Metadata
